name: Originator
notes: Script ui mode is DIALOG — UITree was captured from the multi-path success scenario (success – multiple shape paths via dialog selection) via runFixtureScenario; the single-path scenario auto-centers headlessly without showing a dialog.
PNG rendered via SDB service at 366×530 px (52 553 bytes, device scale factor 2 = 732×1060 CSS px equivalent); file is sane.
expressions[] is empty — no AE expressions are written by this script; expressionCurves is empty by design.
The treeview shows Path 1 and Path 2 items with a 'Center Selected' confirm button and a Cancel button; dialog title is 'Center Shape Path Origin'.
Single-path layers are processed headlessly (auto-center, no dialog) — only layers with 2+ shape paths reach the dialog branch.
